report.title: Promo code at checkout

confidence.reason: Sample artifact — fictional e-commerce slice; not a live codebase

understanding: Shoppers apply a promo code on checkout review; cart service validates eligibility and returns adjusted totals before payment.
Critical flow: enter code → validate → see discount → pay; invalid or expired codes must not partially apply.
Order service persists promo_id and audit fields for finance reconciliation.

gaps.text: Stacking with automatic cart-level discounts — AC silent
Partial application when only some line items qualify

risks.title: Race — code redeemed concurrently after UI shows success
risks.mitigation: Atomic decrement at validation; surface limit-exceeded before payment

risks.title: Price manipulation via client-side total override
risks.mitigation: Server-authoritative totals only; reject mismatched payment amount

risks.title: Stale cart total after promo apply fails silently
risks.mitigation: Invalidate cart cache on any promo mutation

questions: Who owns promo catalog sync latency (marketing tool → cart service)?
Required metric for promo_validation_failed by reason code?
Rollback if over-discount — disable flag vs hotfix?

scenarios.name: Expired code at boundary
scenarios.exploration: Vary clock / valid_until ±1s; observe error copy and cart unchanged

scenarios.name: Usage limit exhaustion
scenarios.exploration: Two sessions same code; second validation after first payment completes

scenarios.name: Category-restricted promo
scenarios.exploration: Mixed eligible / ineligible SKUs; verify per-line vs order-level discount

evidence.text: Assumed: category rules not visible in cited handlers

scenarios.name: Back navigation from payment
scenarios.exploration: Apply valid promo → pay step → back → change qty → re-validate

evidence.text: apps/checkout/routes.ts:18 — promo field on review step

scenarios.name: Invalid code spam
scenarios.exploration: Rapid invalid attempts; rate limit and logging

automation.note: Contract tests for validation API (happy, expired, limit, ineligible SKU)
Smoke apply + remove promo; totals match API fixture
Load test validation endpoint before peak sale

nonfunctional.performance: Validation p95 under cart SLA; cache promo rules with TTL
nonfunctional.security: No code enumeration via distinct errors; auth on admin promo APIs
nonfunctional.accessibility: Error announcements on apply failure; focus management on success
nonfunctional.observability: Structured logs with promo_id, reason, cart_id (no PII in message)

modeOutput.content: REFINEMENT: Missing AC on stacking, partial eligibility, idempotency on navigation, finance audit fields. Suggest explicit cart promo_state machine and contract tests on validation response schema.

coverageGaps.text: No automated concurrency test on usage limits
E2E may not cover back-navigation from payment with promo applied
